summary: Iteration 85: Tested GM Daily Flash Report and Chef Daily Report APIs and UI panels. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Both frontend panels fully functional with all required sections, KPIs, and data displayed correctly. No competitor name references (ALICE/ProfitSword) found in API responses.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (GM Flash and Chef Daily panels working with all sections)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 85 tested 2 new executive daily reports. GM Daily Flash accessible via sidebar 'Dashboard & Overview > GM Daily Flash'. Chef Daily Report accessible via sidebar 'Dashboard & Overview > Chef Daily Report'. Both panels have data-testid attributes: 'gm-flash-panel' and 'chef-daily-panel'. GM Flash shows: Yesterday's Performance (5 KPIs: Occupancy 84.7%, ADR $289.50, RevPAR $245.25, TRevPAR $412.80, GOPPAR $168.40), Revenue Summary (4 cards), MTD table with Budget/LY comparison, Competitive Set Index with penetration scores (106.9, 108, 115.5), Today's Operations (arrivals 42, departures 38, etc.), VIP In-House (3 VIPs), Departmental Revenue (8 departments with variance), Pace Report (OTB vs LY), 7-Day Trend. Chef Daily shows: 6 Cost KPIs (Food 28.4%, Labor 31.2%, Prime 59.6%, Cost/Cover $18.45, Rev/Cover $64.8, Waste 42 lbs), Cover Forecast by meal period with progress bars, 86'd Items (3: Branzino, Lobster Tail, Chocolate Lava Cake), Allergen Alerts from guest_intelligence (2 VIP guests), BEO Events (2: Tech Summit Lunch, Wedding Rehearsal Dinner), Prep Counts by Station (93.6% complete, 4 behind), Staffing (26/28 present, 2 callouts). Daily report data is MOCKED (simulated demo data).

backend_api_tests: GET /api/daily-reports/gm-flash - returns 200
GM Flash has report_date and report_time
GM Flash yesterday has occupancy 84.7%, ADR $289.50, variance calculations
GM Flash MTD has actual vs budget vs LY comparison
GM Flash comp_set has penetration_index (occ 106.9, revpar 115.5)
GM Flash operations has arrivals (42), vip_in_house (3 VIPs)
GM Flash departments has 8 departments with variance
GM Flash pace has current_month_otb vs same_time_ly with variance
GM Flash has 7-day trend data
GET /api/daily-reports/chef-daily - returns 200
Chef Daily has report_date and report_time
Chef Daily costs has food_cost_pct 28.4% with target 30.0%
Chef Daily eighty_sixed has 3 items (Branzino, Lobster Tail, Chocolate Lava Cake)
Chef Daily allergen_summary pulls from guest_intelligence collection
Chef Daily beo_events has 2 events with dietary notes
Chef Daily prep shows 93.6% completion with 4 behind items
Chef Daily staffing shows 26/28 present with 2 callouts
Chef Daily covers has forecast by meal period
GM Flash has no ALICE references
GM Flash has no ProfitSword references
Chef Daily has no ALICE references
Chef Daily has no ProfitSword references
GET /api/health - returns healthy
GET /api/concierge/dashboard - regression test passed
GET /api/housekeeping/dashboard - regression test passed
frontend_gm_flash_tests: GM Daily Flash panel opens from sidebar (Dashboard & Overview > GM Daily Flash)
Yesterday's Performance section with 5 KPI cards (Occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, TRevPAR, GOPPAR)
Revenue Summary (Room Revenue, F&B Revenue, Spa Revenue, Total Revenue)
Month-to-Date table with Budget and LY comparison columns
Competitive Set Index table with penetration scores (106.9, 108, 115.5)
VIP In-House section with 3 guests (Michael Chen, James Smith, Ambassador Wilson)
Departmental Revenue with 8 departments and variance badges
Pace Report (OTB 2840 rooms vs LY 2680 rooms, +160 variance)
frontend_chef_daily_tests: Chef Daily Report panel opens from sidebar
6 Cost KPIs (Food Cost 28.4%, Labor Cost 31.2%, Prime Cost 59.6%, Cost/Cover $18.45, Rev/Cover $64.8, Waste 42 lbs)
Cover Forecast with progress bars per meal period (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, IRD, Banquet)
86'd Items (3) with red alert styling (Branzino, Lobster Tail, Chocolate Lava Cake)
Allergen Alerts from Guest Intelligence (2 VIP guests with allergen badges)
BEO Events (2) with dietary notes and chef notes (Tech Summit Lunch, Wedding Rehearsal Dinner)
Prep Counts by Station with progress bars and BEHIND indicators (93.6% complete)
Staffing section (Scheduled 28, Present 26, Callouts 2, OT Hours 4.5, Agency Staff 1)

gm_daily_flash_report.details: One-page executive briefing with all required sections: Yesterday's Performance (5 KPIs + 4 revenue), MTD vs Budget vs LY, Comp Set penetration index, Operations, VIP In-House, Departmental Revenue, Pace Report, 7-Day Trend

chef_daily_report.details: Kitchen briefing with all required sections: 6 Cost KPIs, Cover Forecast, 86'd Items, Allergen Alerts from guest_intelligence, BEO Events with dietary notes, Prep Counts by Station, Staffing with callout names

no_competitor_references.details: No ALICE or ProfitSword references found in API responses

sidebar_navigation.details: Both reports accessible under 'Dashboard & Overview' group in sidebar

mocked_apis.daily_report_data: Daily report KPIs and data are MOCKED (simulated demo data)
mocked_apis.allergen_data: Allergen alerts pull from guest_intelligence collection (seeded data)
